question: Adjust the OSPFv3 reference bandwidth to 100 Gbps for high-speed interfaces.
q_clean: adjust the ospfv3 reference bandwidth to 100 gbps for high-speed interfaces.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ipv6 router ospf 100
auto-cost reference-bandwidth 100000
end

question: Apply a route-map that sets the default next-hop to 10.20.30.1 for traffic originating from the Guest subnet 10.0.0.0/24.
q_clean: apply a route-map that sets the default next-hop to 10.20.30.1 for traffic originating from the guest subnet 10.0.0.0/24.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
access-list 5 permit 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255
route-map GUEST_TRAFFIC permit 10
match ip address 5
set ip default next-hop 10.20.30.1
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/3
ip policy route-map GUEST_TRAFFIC
end

question: Apply the NAC-RESTRICT access list and activate DHCP snooping and dynamic ARP inspection for the defined management and user VLANs.
q_clean: apply the nac-restrict access list and activate dhcp snooping and dynamic arp inspection for the defined management and user vlans.
ground_truth:
ip access-list extended NAC-RESTRICT
permit ip 10.1.0.0 0.0.0.255 10.2.0.0 0.0.0.255 eq 80
deny ip any any log
ip dhcp snooping vlan 10,20,30,99
ip dhcp snooping
ip arp inspection vlan 10,20,30,99

question: Change the lease time for all current and future clients in the 'General_Users' DHCP pool to infinite.
q_clean: change the lease time for all current and future clients in the 'general_users' dhcp pool to infinite.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ip dhcp pool General_Users
lease infinite
exit
end

question: Configure a default information originate command to redistribute a default route into OSPFv3.
q_clean: configure a default information originate command to redistribute a default route into ospfv3.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ipv6 router ospf 1
default-information originate
end

question: Configure a DHCP server pool for VoIP phones on VLAN 20 using subnet 172.16.20.0/24, providing a DNS server at 8.8.8.8 and a TFTP server option.
q_clean: configure a dhcp server pool for voip phones on vlan 20 using subnet 172.16.20.0/24, providing a dns server at 8.8.8.8 and a tftp server option.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ip dhcp pool VOICE_VLAN
network 172.16.20.0 255.255.255.0
default-router 172.16.20.1
dns-server 8.8.8.8
option 150 ip 172.16.20.5
exit
end

question: Configure an access control list to define traffic between local subnet 10.1.1.0/24 and remote 10.2.2.0/24.
q_clean: configure an access control list to define traffic between local subnet 10.1.1.0/24 and remote 10.2.2.0/24.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ACL-VPN-TRAFFIC
 permit ip 10.1.1.0 0.0.0.255 10.2.2.0 0.0.0.255
exit
end

question: Configure OSPFv3 on the router globally using a specific router ID of 1.1.1.1.
q_clean: configure ospfv3 on the router globally using a specific router id of 1.1.1.1.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ipv6 router ospf 1
router-id 1.1.1.1
end

question: Configure OSPFv3 summary prefix for area 1.
q_clean: configure ospfv3 summary prefix for area 1.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ipv6 router ospf 1
area 1 range 2001:db8:cafe::/48
end

question: Configure PBR to force all traffic matching ACL 10 to exit via interface Tunnel0.
q_clean: configure pbr to force all traffic matching acl 10 to exit via interface tunnel0.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
access-list 10 permit 192.168.200.0 0.0.0.255
route-map VPN_TUNNEL permit 10
match ip address 10
set interface Tunnel0
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/7
ip policy route-map VPN_TUNNEL
end

question: Configure PBR to set the IP precedence to critical for traffic matching access-list 101 coming into interface Gi0/0.
q_clean: configure pbr to set the ip precedence to critical for traffic matching access-list 101 coming into interface gi0/0.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
access-list 101 permit ip any any
route-map QOS_POLICY permit 10
match ip address 101
set ip precedence critical
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
ip policy route-map QOS_POLICY
end

question: Configure the DHCP pool for the data center using subnet 192.168.200.0/26 and set the DNS servers to 192.168.200.2 and 192.168.200.3.
q_clean: configure the dhcp pool for the data center using subnet 192.168.200.0/26 and set the dns servers to 192.168.200.2 and 192.168.200.3.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
ip dhcp pool DATA_CENTER
network 192.168.200.0 255.255.255.192
default-router 192.168.200.1
dns-server 192.168.200.2 192.168.200.3
exit
end

question: Configure the router to provide IP addresses to the IoT subnet 192.168.100.0/24 with a lease duration of only 1 hour.
q_clean: configure the router to provide ip addresses to the iot subnet 192.168.100.0/24 with a lease duration of only 1 hour.

configure terminal

default-router 192.168.100.1
lease 0 1 0
exit
end

question: Create a policy-based route to set the next-hop to 192.168.50.1 for all UDP traffic on port 53.
q_clean: create a policy-based route to set the next-hop to 192.168.50.1 for all udp traffic on port 53.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
access-list 110 permit udp any any eq 53
route-map DNS_REDIRECT permit 10
match ip address 110
set ip next-hop 192.168.50.1
exit
interface Vlan10
ip policy route-map DNS_REDIRECT
end

question: Create a route-map that drops traffic from 172.31.0.0/24 immediately.
q_clean: create a route-map that drops traffic from 172.31.0.0/24 immediately.
ground_truth:
enable
configure terminal
access-list 40 permit 172.31.0.0 0.0.0.255
route-map DROP_POLICY deny 10
match ip address 40
exit
route-map DROP_POLICY permit 20
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/8
ip policy route-map DROP_POLICY
end

question: Create a route-map to redirect traffic from 192.168.10.0/24 to next-hop 10.1.1.5.

exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
ip policy route-map PBR_REDIRECT
end

permit ip 10.1.0.0 0.0.0.255 10.2.0.0 0.0.0.255 eq 80
deny ip any any log

ip dhcp snooping
ip arp inspection vlan 10,20,30,99
